title: IIMU Home - Indian Institute of Management Udaipur
meta_description: IIM Udaipur, a globally recognized B-School, is AACSB accredited and the youngest to feature in both FT and QS Global MIM Rankings. Ranked 6th among IIMs in QS 2025 and listed in FT MIM Rankings for 7 consecutive years, it also stands 4th in India for research (UT Dallas). With global recognition, research excellence, and leadership focus, IIM Udaipur is redefining new-age management education.

Know More IIM Udaipur Where you meet the U within Transforming Minds, Shaping Tomorrow We are relentlessly dedicated to pioneering thought leadership through cutting-edge research that shapes tomorrow’s practice. We will continue to cultivate responsible leaders equipped with enduring values and practical knowledge, delivering a truly transformational experience that empowers them to drive future prosperity and social impact within the region and beyond. Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) The IIM Udaipur BBA Program is a four-year undergraduate offering designed to deliver IIM-quality management education through a flexible, digital-first model. With milestone credentials across each year, bilingual learning support, faculty-led academic design, and a scholarship-supported fee structure, the Program aims to make high-quality business education more accessible to diverse learners across India. KNOW MORE Two-Year MBA Program 2026-28 – Click here to check the result. Two-Year MBA Program 2026-28 – Click here to check the result. Two-Year MBA Program The two year MBA Program program of IIMU is designed to be a transformational experience for students, developing them into socially responsible and highly skilled managers well launched on the path to leading their organization towards excellence. The MBA graduate program lasts two years over six terms with a compulsory Internship at the end of the 1st year. KNOW MORE Apply Now! Admissions for 2026 Batch Are Open. Apply Now! Read More IIM Udaipur congratulates Prof. Govind Kumawat on his research paper being accepted for publication in the European Journal of Operational Research Read More IIM Udaipur congratulates Prof. Prakash Satyavageeswaran and Prof. Elizabeth Rose on their research paper being accepted for publication in the Journal of International Business Studies Read More Explore All News IIMU Research Centres Know More IIMU Executive Education Short Duration – On Campus Programs IIM Udaipur offers open short-duration programs conducted at the campus and delivered in person. These residential programs are typically of 3 to 12 days duration and participants are expected to come to campus for learning. These short-duration open programs are designed to deliver management learning to working executives who are looking for new insights and perspectives to help their organizations address emerging challenges and opportunities in the contemporary economic environment. Participants may either be self-sponsored or company-sponsored.
